name: Grupo Financiero Valores S.A.
summary: Grupo Financiero Valores S.A. engages in financial and investment activities. The company offers commercial banking services comprising investment banking products; and engages in the trading and negotiation of futures contracts and options. It also executes trades and provides clearing house and central counterparty services for the settlement and monitoring of transactions, as well as offers risk management services. The company was formerly known as Mercado de Valores de Buenos Aires S.A. and changed its name to Grupo Financiero Valores S.A. Grupo Financiero Valores S.A. was founded in 1929 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
